hooks.prompt:
A file was just edited or written. Look at the file path in the tool input: tool_input = $ARGUMENTS. Check if this change affects any of the following core areas of KinderSpark Pro:
1. A new database model or field was added/changed (backend/prisma/schema.prisma)
2. A new API route or endpoint was added (backend/src/routes/)
3. A new frontend page or route was added (frontend/app/)
4. A new service or controller was added (backend/src/services/ or controllers/)
5. A new environment variable is needed
6. A new learning module was added (frontend/lib/modules.ts)
7. A new GitHub Actions workflow was added (.github/workflows/)
8. A security rule changed
9. A design system rule changed
10. A Known Gap was fixed

If YES to any of the above, output this exact message so Claude knows to update CLAUDE.md:
{"additionalContext": "MEMORY UPDATE REQUIRED: The file just edited touches a core area. You MUST now update /CLAUDE.md to reflect this change before finishing your task. Keep the update concise (1-2 lines). Do not skip this step."}

If NO, output nothing.
